name: Add transparent DSL to current sitrep feature

operations.find:
function renderHoldoutState(sitrep, state) { const scoreStatus = state.holdoutScore >= 1 ? "POSITION HOLDING" : "POSITION OVERRUN"; const scoreClass = state.holdoutScore >= 1 ? "holding" : "overrun"; return `
${esc(state.regionName)}
${scoreStatus}
PROJECTED SCORE ${state.holdoutScore} ${state.holdoutBaseScore} starting points − ${state.hostileInZone} enemies in zone
ENEMIES IN ZONE ${state.hostileInZone}
ALLIES IN ZONE ${state.friendlyInZone}
ALLIES STANDING ${state.friendlyStanding}
HOSTILES STANDING ${state.hostileStanding}
`; }

function renderControlState(sitrep, state) { const zones = state.controlZones .map( (zone, index) => `
OBJECTIVE ${String.fromCharCode(65 + index)}
${esc(zone.name)}
${controlZoneLabel(zone.controller)}
${zone.friendly} ALLIED ${zone.hostile} HOSTILE
` ) .join(""); return `
ALLIED SCORE ${state.friendlyScore}
HOSTILE SCORE ${state.hostileScore}
ALLIED ZONES: ${state.friendlyZones} HOSTILE ZONES: ${state.hostileZones}
${zones}
`; }

operations.replace:
content: chatResult(
        status === "victory"
          ? "MISSION SUCCESS"
          : "MISSION FAILED",
        [esc(reason)],
        status
      )

operations.find:
content: `
CONTROL — ROUND ${completedRound} SCORED
Allies +${friendlyRoundPoints} | Hostiles +${hostileRoundPoints}
Total: Allies ${sitrep.scores.friendly} — Hostiles ${sitrep.scores.hostile}
`
operations.replace:
content: chatResult(
          `CONTROL — ROUND ${completedRound} SCORED`,
          [
            `Allies +${friendlyRoundPoints} | Hostiles +${hostileRoundPoints}`,
            `Total: Allies ${sitrep.scores.friendly} — Hostiles ${sitrep.scores.hostile}`
          ]
        )
